pages.name: Home
pages.description: Entry point to the XR / immersive studio, highlighting key services, featured work, and primary calls-to-action.
primary_functions: Introduce the studio’s XR, AR, VR, and immersive capabilities.
Provide clear navigation to Training & Simulation, Marketing & Brand Experiences, Pop-up Installations, Case Studies, Events, and Contact.
Highlight featured case studies, flagship campaigns, and upcoming workshops.
Offer quick access buttons to request a quote, start a project brief, or configure a pop-up installation.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Services' primary navigation link or hero CTA to explore all services.
Click on Training & Simulation feature tile or CTA.
Click on Marketing & Brand Experiences feature tile or CTA.
Click on Pop-up Installations feature tile or CTA.
Click on a flagship service package card in the hero or featured services section.
Click on any case study cluster header or 'View all case studies' link.
Click on a featured case study card.
Click on 'View all workshops' under upcoming events.
Click on an individual upcoming workshop/event card.
Click on hero CTA such as 'Configure a pop-up installation'.
Click on a global 'Request a quote' or 'Contact us' CTA in the homepage.

access_methods.description: Accessible from the 'Home' link in the main navigation.
Default landing page when visiting the root domain.

pages.name: Services Overview
pages.description: High-level overview of all service categories offered by the studio.
primary_functions: Present main service categories: Training & Simulation, Marketing & Brand Experiences, Pop-up Installations, and other key offerings.
Route users into the appropriate service category listing pages for more detailed exploration.
Explain typical engagement models and link to Contact for general inquiries.
Surface direct CTAs for requesting quotes or project briefs for popular services.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on the Training & Simulation category card.
Click on the Marketing & Brand Experiences category card.
Click on the Pop-up Installations category card.
Click on a highlighted popular package/campaign in the overview.
Click on 'Talk to us' or 'Request a custom quote' CTA.

access_methods.description: Accessible from the 'Services' link in the main navigation.
Accessible from the 'Services Overview' link in the footer.
Linked from About and other pages where all services are referenced.

pages.name: Service Category Listing
pages.description: Service-specific catalog of packages and offerings with filters and sorting (e.g., Training & Simulation, Marketing & Brand Experiences, Pop-up Installations).
primary_functions: Show service-specific introduction content based on serviceId (e.g., training_simulation, marketing_brand, pop_up_installations).
Provide filters such as technology (vr, ar, mixed_reality), experience type, industry, participants/team_size, budget/price, and expected reach.
Allow sorting of offerings (e.g., price_low_to_high, audience_reach_high_to_low, most_impact).
List relevant packages or campaign offerings as cards that link to detailed pages.
For the Pop-up Installations category, present a clear button to open the Pop-up Installation Configurator.

incoming_params.description: Identifies which ServiceCategory to display; maps directly to ServiceCategory.slug (e.g., 'training_simulation', 'marketing_brand', 'pop_up_installations').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a service package/campaign card in the listing.
Click on 'Configure your experience' when browsing the Pop-up Installations category.
Click on a generic 'Need something custom?' or 'Contact us' CTA in the category intro.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Training & Simulation', 'Marketing & Brand Experiences', or 'Pop-up Installations' header links, each providing a different serviceId.
Accessible via service-specific footer links with the appropriate serviceId.
Direct links from Services Overview and contextual CTAs include a serviceId query parameter.

pages.name: Service Package Detail
pages.description: Detailed view of a specific service package or campaign (e.g., VR safety training package, AR product launch campaign).
primary_functions: Display full details of the package including description, objectives, inclusions, technology used, pricing, supported participants, and expected reach where applicable.
Show key metadata required for tasks (e.g., minimum/maximum participants, budget, expected reach 100k+, location constraints).
Provide context-specific CTAs such as 'Request Quote', 'Add to Quote', or 'Start Project Brief'.
Present inline or modal forms for quote requests and project briefs, capturing fields such as contact name, company, budget, desired dates, participant counts, and notes.
Suggest related packages or campaigns to encourage exploration of alternatives.

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the ServicePackage to display, used to fetch full package details.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a related package or campaign in the 'You may also like' section.
Click on breadcrumb link back to the parent service category.

access_methods.description: Accessed by selecting a package in any service category listing, passing ?servicePackageId=... in the URL.
Featured flagship packages on the homepage or Services Overview link directly with the appropriate servicePackageId.

pages.name: Pop-up Installation Configurator
pages.description: Interactive configurator to design and estimate a custom immersive pop-up installation.
primary_functions: Capture configuration inputs like location (e.g., New York, NY, USA), date/event window, audience size, and expected visitors.
Allow selection and modification of experience zones/modules (e.g., Immersive Tunnel, Interactive Game Zone, Photo Booth).
Dynamically calculate and display an estimated total cost, guiding the user to adjust modules until the estimate fits between specified budget ranges (e.g., $25,000–$35,000).
Provide a 'Save & Request Quote' or 'Save Configuration' action that reveals a form for contact details (name, company, email).
Submit the configuration and contact details as a quote request while confirming the saved configuration for future reference.

incoming_params.description: Optional pre-filled location for the pop-up installation (e.g., 'New York, NY, USA').
Optional pre-filled minimum expected audience size.
Optional pre-filled maximum expected audience size.
Optional pre-selected event date in ISO format (e.g., '2025-06-15').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on supplemental 'Discuss this configuration with us' or similar CTA after saving.

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Configure your experience' buttons within the Pop-up Installations service category.
Accessed via dedicated hero or CTA links on the homepage that deep-link into the configurator.
Optional query parameters allow pre-filling location, audience, and date when linked from campaigns or emails.

pages.name: Case Studies Listing
pages.description: Browseable gallery of the studio’s XR case studies across industries and technologies.
primary_functions: Filter case studies by technology (e.g., vr, ar, mixed_reality) and industry (e.g., retail, healthcare, education).
Display case study cards with summaries, thumbnail imagery, technology tags, and industries.
Support workflows like selecting VR case studies for specific industries to build a training ideas shortlist.
Allow quick 'Save' or 'Add to Shortlist' actions from cards or link into the Case Study Detail page.
Provide navigation to the Saved Collections page to review shortlists.

incoming_params.description: Optional filter to pre-select a case study technology such as 'vr', 'ar', 'mixed_reality', or 'xr'.
Optional filter to pre-select an industry such as 'retail', 'healthcare', or 'education'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a case study card in the grid.
Click on 'View Training ideas shortlist' or 'View saved collections' link.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Case Studies' link in the main navigation.
Accessible via the 'Case Studies' link in the footer.
Optional URL parameters (technology, industry) can be appended to pre-filter the listing.

pages.name: Case Study Detail
pages.description: Detailed narrative and results for a specific XR case study.
primary_functions: Show full case study content including challenge, solution, technology stack, industry, metrics, and media (images/video).
Provide a prominent 'Save', 'Bookmark', or 'Add to Shortlist' button to add the case study to a named collection (e.g., 'Training ideas').
Allow users to create a new collection or choose an existing one when saving.
Offer breadcrumb navigation back to the Case Studies Listing and links to related case studies by technology or industry.
Highlight applicable services and link to corresponding service category pages for users interested in similar solutions.

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the CaseStudy record to render.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on breadcrumb 'Back to Case Studies'.
Click on a related service category CTA such as 'Explore Training & Simulation services'.
Click on a related case study in the sidebar or footer of the page.

access_methods.description: Accessed when a user selects a case study card, which passes ?caseStudyId=... in the URL.
Featured case studies on the homepage and other sections link directly with the caseStudyId parameter.

pages.name: Saved Collections & Reading Lists
pages.description: Central hub for managing saved case study shortlists and reading lists (e.g., 'Training ideas', 'XR Inspiration').
primary_functions: Display all user-created collections for case studies and resources in a simple, grouped view.
List items within each collection with quick links back to case study or article detail pages.
Allow users to rename or delete collections and remove individual items from collections.
Provide context links back to Case Studies and Resources pages to continue discovery.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a saved case study within a collection.
Click on a saved article within a reading list.
Click on 'Find more VR case studies' contextual link.
Click on 'Browse more resources' link.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Saved Collections' link in the footer.
Linked from save/confirmation to let users review all saved items.

pages.name: Resources & Blog Listing
pages.description: Searchable and filterable library of articles, insights, and resources about XR, including museums/exhibitions and retail topics.
primary_functions: Provide search and topic filters (e.g., museums_exhibitions, retail, xr_strategy, training) to narrow down articles.
Display article cards with titles, summaries, tags, and publish dates.
Enable workflows such as finding articles that mention museums/exhibitions or retail for inspiration.
Allow quick 'Save' or 'Add to Reading List' actions from cards and link to Article Detail pages.
Offer navigation to the Saved Collections page for reviewing reading lists like 'XR Inspiration'.

incoming_params.description: Optional pre-selected topic filter such as 'museums_exhibitions', 'retail', or 'xr_strategy'.
Optional search term used to pre-populate the search bar and initial results.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an article card in the results list.
Click on 'View XR Inspiration reading list' or general 'View saved collections' link.

access_methods.description: Accessible from the 'Resources' header navigation link.
Accessible via the 'Resources & Blog' footer link.
Optional topic and search query parameters can be included to pre-filter results.

pages.name: Article Detail
pages.description: Full content view for a specific resource article or blog post.
primary_functions: Display the complete article including text, media, author, and publication date.
Provide a 'Save', 'Bookmark', or 'Add to Reading List' button to store the article in named lists such as 'XR Inspiration'.
Offer a simple workflow to create a new reading list or add to an existing one on save.
Show related articles and links back to the Resources & Blog Listing for continued reading.

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the Article to render.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on breadcrumb or 'Back to Resources' link.
Click on a related article recommendation.

access_methods.description: Accessed when an article card is selected, passing ?articleId=... in the URL.
Featured articles on the homepage or other pages link directly with the articleId query parameter.

pages.name: Events & Workshops Listing
pages.description: Catalog of upcoming XR events and workshops, including XR strategy sessions.
primary_functions: List upcoming events and workshops with basic info like title, date, topic, level, and price.
Provide filters for topic/category (e.g., xr_strategy), level (e.g., beginner, intermediate), date range (e.g., next 60 days), and price range (e.g., under $300).
Enable users to identify relevant beginner XR strategy workshops within specific date and budget constraints.
Link each event to its Event Detail page for more information and registration.

incoming_params.description: Optional pre-selected topic for events, such as 'xr_strategy' or 'training'.
Optional pre-selected level for events, such as 'beginner'.
Optional maximum ticket price used to pre-fill the price filter.
Optional ISO start date for the date range filter.
Optional ISO end date for the date range filter.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an event/workshop card in the listing.

access_methods.description: Accessible from the 'Events & Workshops' header navigation link.
Accessible from the 'Events & Workshops' footer link.
Optional query parameters allow pre-filtering by topic, level, date range, and price.

pages.name: Event Detail & Registration
pages.description: Detail page for a specific event or workshop, including registration.
primary_functions: Show full event details: description, agenda, date and time, location or online format, level, price, and capacity if relevant.
Provide a clear 'Register' or 'Reserve Seat' button that opens or scrolls to a registration form on the same page.
Capture registration details such as full name, email, number of seats/tickets, and optional notes.
Confirm registration submission and provide any next-step information (e.g., confirmation message, calendar link).

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the Event to display and register for.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on breadcrumb or 'Back to all events' link.

access_methods.description: Users arrive from the events listing via a link that passes ?eventId=... in the URL.
Upcoming or featured events on the homepage can deep-link here using eventId.

pages.name: Careers Listing
pages.description: Listing of open roles at the XR studio with filtering by department and seniority.
primary_functions: Display all current job openings with summary information (title, department, seniority level, location).
Provide filters for department/discipline (e.g., design, ux_ui_design) and seniority (e.g., mid_level, senior).
Allow users to easily find mid-level UX-focused roles that mention XR/AR/VR in their summaries.
Link each job listing to its Job Detail & Application page.

incoming_params.description: Optional pre-selected department filter, such as 'design' or 'ux_ui_design'.
Optional pre-selected seniority level filter, such as 'mid_level'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a job title in the careers listing.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Careers' link in the main navigation.
Accessible via the 'Careers' link in the footer.
Optional query parameters (department, seniority) can pre-filter the listing for targeted campaigns.

pages.name: Job Detail & Application
pages.description: Detailed job description page with an application form for a specific role.
primary_functions: Present the full job description including responsibilities, requirements, desired experience range (e.g., 3–5 years), and location/remote policy.
Provide an 'Apply Now' or 'Submit Application' button leading to an on-page application form.
Capture candidate details like full name, email, headline/subject, portfolio URL, cover message, current location, and LinkedIn URL.
Support application submission without requiring any file uploads, keeping upload fields optional and skippable.
Confirm application submission and outline expected next steps or timelines.

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the Job opening the user wants to view and apply for.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on breadcrumb or 'Back to all roles' link.

access_methods.description: Users access this page via job listings that pass ?jobId=... in the URL.
Specific roles can be shared externally using a direct link including jobId.

pages.name: Contact & Partnerships
pages.description: Primary contact page supporting general inquiries and partnership-specific requests such as agency white-label XR production.
primary_functions: Provide an 'Inquiry Type' selector with options like general_inquiry, project_quote, agency_partner, partnership_inquiry.
Offer an 'Areas of Interest' or 'Services' multi-select including white_label_production or white_label_xr_production.
Include budget and geographic/region fields to capture ranges (e.g., minimum budget of $60,000) and regions (e.g., United States and European Union).
Capture contact details such as name, company, email, and a free-text message field for describing partnership needs.
Submit the inquiry and display a confirmation message with expected response time.

incoming_params.description: Optional parameter to pre-select the inquiry type (e.g., 'agency_partner', 'project_quote').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Explore Training & Simulation' after a successful quote request submission.
Click on 'Explore Marketing & Brand Experiences' after a successful partnership inquiry.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'Contact & Partnerships' header navigation link.
Accessible from the 'Contact & Partnerships' footer link.
Optional ?inquiryType=... parameter allows CTAs to deep-link into a pre-configured form state.

pages.name: About
pages.description: Background on the XR studio, its mission, team, and approach.
primary_functions: Explain the studio’s mission, capabilities, and differentiators in XR, AR, and VR.
Introduce key team members or leadership to build trust and credibility.
Link to key sections such as Services, Case Studies, and Contact for users ready to engage.
Provide a high-level overview of typical client engagement processes and industries served.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Explore our services' CTA.
Click on 'View our work' link from the About page.
Click on 'Talk to our team' CTA.
Click on 'Join the team' section link.

access_methods.description: Accessible via the 'About' link in the footer.
Linked from the homepage hero or secondary navigation elements.

pages.name: Privacy Policy
pages.description: Information on how user data is collected, stored, and used.
primary_functions: Detail the studio’s data collection, processing, and retention practices.
Explain cookie usage and options for users to manage their privacy preferences.
Outline user rights related to data access, correction, and deletion.
Provide contact information for privacy-related inquiries.

access_methods.description: Accessible from the 'Privacy Policy' footer link.
Linked from legal notices, emails, or cookie banners.

pages.name: Terms of Use
pages.description: Legal terms governing use of the website and its content.
primary_functions: Describe acceptable use of the website, content ownership, and intellectual property rights.
Limit liability and outline disclaimers related to the information provided.
Explain governing law and dispute resolution mechanisms.
Provide references to related legal documents such as the Privacy Policy.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a reference link to the Privacy Policy within the terms content.

access_methods.description: Accessible from the 'Terms of Use' footer link.
Linked from contracts, emails, or other legal references.

header_links.description: VR/AR training and simulation packages, including safety training
Marketing, brand, and product launch XR/AR campaigns
Immersive pop-up and experiential installations with configurator access
Portfolio of XR work across industries
Listing of upcoming XR events and workshops
Open roles and opportunities at the studio
Contact form for general and partnership inquiries

footer_links.description: Training & Simulation service details and packages
Pop-up Installations service details and configurator access
XR case studies by industry and technology
Insights, guides, and articles about XR
View and manage saved shortlists and reading lists
Contact details and partnership inquiry form
Website usage terms and legal information
